title: Kitchen Karrot
body:
### Welcome to KitchenKarrot - a *lightweight* Minecraft mod that expands on food with *simple* yet *satisfying* mechanics.
Our philosophy: Delicious in Pockets!

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


# 【Key Features】


## 🍔 Food!
![Mod Main Poster](https://s2.loli.net/2025/05/21/SsuyrGzBXt4RMo3.png "Mod Food Showcase")
From grand banquets to quick snacks, from vanilla-style recipes to modern creations - discover ***90+ NEW FOOD*** across multiple themes!

- **Vanilla+ Cuisine**: Interesting and balanced vanilla-style food that you may have thought of.
- **Modern Treats Collection**: Fast food combos, decadent desserts and even canned foods
- **Cultural Fusion**: Regional specialties from around the blocky world
## 🍽 Plated Perfection!
![Plating Showcase A](https://s2.loli.net/2025/05/21/Klq6bp9jNkmEvCg.jpg "")
![Plating Showcase B.jpg](https://s2.loli.net/2025/05/21/kl1i9gqhZDjE2Gb.png)
Showcase your kitchen masterpieces with our ***interactive PLATING system***!
Fill up your kitchen with unique food models!
## 🥂 Let's Get Toasted!
![Brewing Recipes](https://s2.loli.net/2025/05/21/6BIH4EP5x9oQKW2.jpg "Brewing Recipes")
![Cocktail Recipes](https://s2.loli.net/2025/05/21/cHZwDq1Ke7sTFnX.jpg "Default Cocktails")
Why settle for potions when you can have some liquor running through your virtual throat!
Take part in the ***brewing system*** of KitchenKarrot and have some homebrew alcohol!
What's more? Why not be inventive on datapack-driven ***COCKTAILS***?


# Q&A
> Q1: What's the difference between Kitchen Karrot and other mods like Farmer's Delight?
>     
> A1: While may not have that lavish feast you expected, Kitchen Karrot delivers well-rounded, straightforward snacks. We empower every type of player to participate in creating their own cuisine experience by using simplified recipes, especially those who eats only their breads, baked potatoes and golden carrots!

> Q2: How do I report bugs or give suggestions?
>    
> A2: Feel free to join our [discord](https://discord.gg/dZWaXG9E). As a chinese I struggle to login to discord and I don't really know how to manage a server. But still, I will be checking messages.

> Q3: [other game versions]/Fabric/Quilt?
>    
> A3: Depending on current progress. No guarantee. Outdated versions are less likely to maintenance.

> Q4: Will it be compatible with XXX ?
>    
> A4: Theoretically compatible with everything. If there are crushes or some other eerie things, please report to me through discord or github issue.

> Q5: Can I add this mod to my modpack ?
>    
> A5: Of course. This mod is created for everyone to have fun.

> Q6: Patreon?
>    
> A6: No. Save your money for yourself.
